actions.name: set_title
actions.desc: Set the document Title metadata by picking text from the first matching structure tag (H1). This aligns metadata with the visible main heading for assistive technologies and preserves any existing Title unless overwrite is enabled.
actions.title: Set Title (From H1 Heading)

actions.name: set_title
actions.desc: Set the document Title metadata from the PDF Info dictionary. Use this as a reliable fallback when the tag structure does not contain a suitable heading. Existing Title is preserved unless overwrite is enabled.
actions.title: Set Title (From Info Dictionary)

actions.name: set_title
actions.desc: Set the document Title metadata from the input file name. This provides a deterministic fallback title when neither tag-based detection nor existing Info metadata is suitable. Existing Title is preserved unless overwrite is enabled.
actions.title: Set Title (From File Name)

actions.name: set_pdf_ua_standard
actions.title: Set PDF/UA-1 Identifier
actions.desc: Declare PDF/UA-1 conformance by setting the appropriate PDF/UA identifier in the document metadata.
